accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text including agency listings, deadlines, and Advisory Council requirements.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the purpose — establishing a National Parkinson's Project within the Public Health Service Act.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the act establishes a new section within the Public Health Service Act.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the 2035 termination and agency information-sharing obligation; covers key deadlines.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes 24-month deadline for first assessment, 18-month deadline for first Advisory Council report, and 2035 sunset.

major_provisions_covered.why: Comprehensively covers all major provisions including Project duties, Advisory Council, information sharing, and sunset.

concise.why: Very long and granular; reads more like a section-by-section analysis than a concise summary.

correct_entities.why: All agencies and program names correctly stated.

correct_figures.why: All deadlines and dates correctly stated.
